---
title: "Great Ormond Street Hospital"
---

## Great Ormond Street Hospital

**Type:** organization

### About

A children’s hospital was founded in Great Ormond Street in 1852.  Individuals and groups could sponsor beds for sick children.   See Nicholas Baldwin, ‘The History of GOSH: The Whole Story’ at http://www.ich.ucl.ac.uk/about_gosh/gosh_history/

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
